text:
11 MCP servers: 22,945 tokens before a single user message.

GitHub alone: 15,927 tokens.

typed your first question yet? no. you've already spent 18% of a 128K context window.

typical agent setup: github + slack + notion + 2 custom servers.

~24K tokens before message 1.

at $0.003/1K tokens: $0.07/conversation. 1,000 conversations/day: $2,160/month. on tool definitions.

postgres MCP: 33 tokens for 1 tool.

github MCP: 15,927 tokens for 80 tools.

if every server built like postgres, 11 servers would cost ~400 tokens total instead of 23,000.
